languages.text: "Скажи, что мне нужны их услуги. Имплантационный трон в моем Секторе Бионика требует знаний, известных лишь им".
"Tell them I require their services. The implantation throne in my Sector Bionica requires expertise only they possess."
languages.original_text: "Скажи, что мне нужны их услуги. Имплантационный трон в моем Секторе Бионика требует знаний, известных лишь им".

traits.locale_text: "Tell them I need their services. The implantation throne in my Sector Bionica requires expertise only they possess."
"Tell them I need their services. The implantation throne in my Sector Bionica requires expertise only they possess."
"Tell them I require their services. The implantation throne in my Sector Bionica requires expertise only they possess."
"Tell them I require their services. The implantation throne in my Sector Bionica requires expertise only they possess."

languages.text: "Sagt ihnen, ich brauche ihre Dienste. Der Implantationsthron in meinem Sektor Bionica erfordert eine Expertise, über die nur sie verfügen."
languages.original_text: "Tell them I require their services. The implantation throne in my Sector Bionica requires expertise only they possess."

traits.locale_text: "Sagt ihnen, ich brauche ihre Dienste. Der Implantationsthron in meinem Sektor Bionica erfordert eine Expertise, über die nur sie verfügen."

languages.text: « Dites-leur que je requiers leurs services. Le fauteuil d'implantation dans le secteur Bionica nécessite leur expertise. »
languages.original_text: "Tell them I require their services. The implantation throne in my Sector Bionica requires expertise only they possess."

traits.locale_text: « Dites-leur que je requiers leurs services. Le fauteuil d'implantation dans le secteur Bionica nécessite leur expertise. »

languages.text: “告诉他们，我需要他们的协助。仿生区的移植王座需要只有他们才掌握的专业知识。”
languages.original_text: "Tell them I require their services. The implantation throne in my Sector Bionica requires expertise only they possess."

traits.locale_text: “告诉他们，我需要他们的协助。仿生区的移植王座需要只有他们才掌握的专业知识。”

languages.text: «Infórmeles de que necesito sus servicios. El trono de implantación de mi Sector Bionica requiere de capacidades que solo ellos poseen».
languages.original_text: "Tell them I require their services. The implantation throne in my Sector Bionica requires expertise only they possess."

traits.locale_text: «Infórmeles de que necesito sus servicios. El trono de implantación de mi Sector Bionica requiere de capacidades que solo ellos poseen».

languages.text: "彼らのサービスが必要だと伝えてくれ。私のバイオニックセクターの移植王座には、彼らだけが知っている知識が必要です。"
languages.original_text: "Tell them I require their services. The implantation throne in my Bionic Sector requires knowledge known only to them."

languages.text: "Onlara hizmetlerine ihtiyacım olduğunu söyle. Sektör Biyonika'daki implantasyon tahtım, sadece onların sahip olduğu bir uzmanlık gerektiriyor."
languages.original_text: "Tell them I require their services. The implantation throne in my Sector Bionica requires expertise only they possess."

traits.locale_text: "Onlara hizmetlerine ihtiyacım olduğunu söyle. Sektör Biyonika'daki implantasyon tahtım, sadece onların sahip olduğu bir uzmanlık gerektiriyor."
